title: ‘Turn around immediately’: Moment Iranian Navy blocks Indian tanker in Strait of Hormuz - Watch
content: Two Indian-flagged tankers, Bhagya Lakshmi and Sanmar Herald, were denied passage and reportedly fired upon by Iranian gunboats in the Strait of Hormuz. Crew members of Bhagya Lakshmi were told to turn back, while Sanmar Herald reported being fired upon despite prior clearance. India has raised concerns with Iran over the safety of merchant shipping.

title: ‘Mentioned Congress 59 times, women barely’: Kharge leads opposition charge against PM's speech
content: Opposition leaders Mallikarjun Kharge, Mamata Banerjee, and D.K. Shivakumar have strongly criticized Prime Minister Narendra Modi, accusing him of misrepresenting facts regarding the women's reservation bill. They contend the government used the bill as a political shield for delimitation, not genuine empowerment, and that the bill's passage was deliberately stalled. Leaders emphasized Congress's long-standing support for women's representation.

title: 'His mind appears to be cluttered': Ashwin's blunt take on CSK captain Gaikwad
content: Chennai Super Kings are struggling in IPL 2026, currently seventh with a 2-4 record. Skipper Ruturaj Gaikwad's form is a major concern, with just 82 runs in six matches. Former India spinner R Ashwin believes Gaikwad missed a prime opportunity to regain form against Sunrisers Hyderabad, suggesting he's under immense pressure.

title: 'You removed my company accounts without warning': Tech startup CEO to Anthropic
content: Fintech firm Belo's entire Claude AI account, with over 60 users, was unexpectedly shut down by Anthropic for alleged policy violations. CTO Pato Molina expressed frustration over the lack of explanation and a difficult appeal process. Following a viral outcry on X, Anthropic restored access, deeming it a false positive.

title: Deepika expecting 2nd baby with Ranveer, makes announcement via social media
content: Deepika Padukone and Ranveer Singh are expecting their second child, with Deepika sharing a cute social media post hinting at her baby bump. The couple, married in 2018 in Italy, already welcomed daughter Dua in 2024, and fans are thrilled as their family grows once again.

title: Vijay’s TVK backs independent candidate in Salem’s Edappadi, calls for ‘fitting lesson’
content: Actor-turned-politician Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) will back an independent candidate in Edappadi after their nominee's disqualification. Vijay urged voters to support K Premakumar, calling it a "fitting lesson" against alleged suppression of their symbol. This strategic shift occurs as TVK, launched in February, contests its first Assembly elections against established Dravidian parties.

title: IPL 2026: KKR get timely boost as Rs 18 crore recruit finally joins squad
content: Kolkata Knight Riders have received a significant boost with the arrival of Sri Lankan pace sensation Matheesha Pathirana, who has cleared fitness tests. Despite his presence, the team management might be cautious about his immediate inclusion. KKR, struggling with six winless matches and tactical questions, faces a strong Rajasthan Royals side.

title: ‘Father of AGI’ says human-level AI 2-3 years away, warns of ‘job apocalypse'
content: AI pioneer Ben Goertzel predicts human-level AGI within two to three years, warning of a significant 'job apocalypse' as most professions become obsolete. While manual labor and some creative roles may persist longer, the focus for humans will shift from earning a living to finding purpose, potentially ushering in a utopian world with more leisure time and UBI.

title: Caught drinking in MP hospital bed, patient shoots at doctor, flees
content: A 23-year-old patient at a community health centre in Satna allegedly opened fire at a doctor after being caught drinking on his hospital bed. The patient, identified as Shivam Dwivedi, then fled the scene on a bike. The incident has raised serious security concerns at the facility.

title: 'Free healthcare, Rs 36,000 yearly': PM Modi's women-focused poll pitch in Bengal
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi accused the Trinamool Congress of opposing the women's reservation bill, claiming the party worked against greater political representation for Bengal's daughters. He asserted the BJP prioritizes women's empowerment and safety, promising improved welfare delivery if elected in the state.

title: OpenAI exec Srinivas Narayanan leaves to spend time with ageing parents in India
content: Srinivas Narayanan, OpenAI's CTO for B2B applications, is departing the company next week after nearly three years. He plans to visit his parents in India before considering future professional endeavors. Narayanan, who previously served as VP of Engineering, shared his departure on LinkedIn, calling his tenure at the AI firm 'three incredible years'.

title: Rs 20,000 crore gold, silver rush: What will people buy this Akshaya Tritiya?
content: India's gold and silver markets anticipate over Rs 20,000 crore in sales this Akshay Tritiya, a rise from last year's Rs 16,000 crore, despite record-high prices. Consumers are shifting towards lightweight jewelry and silver, with a notable decline in the volume of metals purchased, indicating value growth driven by price escalation rather than increased consumption.

title: India’s LPG consumption drops 13% in March amid Middle East supply disruptions
content: India's cooking gas use plunged 13% in March, hit by Middle East conflict-induced supply snags. While household needs were prioritized, commercial LPG consumption saw a drastic drop. Domestic production was boosted to compensate for import disruptions, though overall fiscal year LPG demand still grew. Jet fuel demand remained flat, but petrol and diesel consumption showed strength.

title: Ayush Mhatre injury update: CSK's Michael Hussey shares major concern
content: Chennai Super Kings face a significant injury blow as young batter Ayush Mhatre suffered a hamstring tear during their match against Sunrisers Hyderabad. Mhatre was seen limping badly after pulling up midway through a run, and batting coach Michael Hussey confirmed the injury looks "really bad" and could be a "big loss" for the team.

title: Caught on cam: Fan's 'black magic' act during IPL match; CSK star falls next ball
content: A Sunrisers Hyderabad fan's alleged 'black magic' ritual involving a lemon coincided with Shivam Dube's dismissal, sparking debate online. SRH secured a 10-run victory over Chennai Super Kings, with captain Ishan Kishan praising his young bowlers' execution despite feeling his team was short on runs. SRH next faces Delhi Capitals.

title: ‘You gave me clearance to go': Indian vessel’s frantic distress call during Hormuz firing revealed
content: Two India-flagged vessels, the Sanmar Herald and Jag Arnav, were targeted by Iranian gunboats in the Strait of Hormuz, forcing a convoy of 14 ships to abort transit. The incident caused confusion over passage instructions, with multiple vessels turning back. India has lodged a protest with Iran, urging safe passage for merchant shipping.

title: 'Clear way for marriage': 5-year-old killed by mother’s partner in Telangana
content: A five-year-old boy was brutally killed by his mother's live-in partner in Kamareddy. The accused allegedly smothered and beat the child after his mother left home. Police arrested both the partner and the mother, stating they planned to eliminate the boy due to his mental health issues to facilitate their marriage. The eight-year-old sister is the sole eyewitness.

title: Will real estate prices in Gurugram continue to soar? What experts are saying
content: Gurugram is transforming into a prime real estate hub, driven by infrastructure upgrades and strong residential demand, especially in New Gurugram.  The region's growth is further bolstered by its emergence as a logistics and commercial center.  New micro-markets are attracting end-users and investors with improved connectivity and lifestyle amenities, promising significant future value.

title: 'Bhooth Bangla' earns over Rs 60 cr worldwide in just two days
content: Akshay Kumar and Wamiqa Gabbi's horror-comedy 'Bhooth Bangla' has made a strong debut, grossing Rs 42 crore in India and Rs 60.50 crore worldwide within its first two days. Directed by Priyadarshan, the film marks a reunion for the director and Akshay Kumar after 15 years.

title: Darshan Kumar passes away at 70; Mika Singh shares heartfelt tribute
content: T-Series owner Darshan Kumar, brother of founder Gulshan Kumar, passed away in Delhi at 70. Known for his behind-the-scenes support of artists, his contributions earned him deep respect within the music industry. Singer Mika Singh shared an emotional tribute, highlighting Kumar's role in launching and supporting numerous talents.

title: Pregnant, not main accused: What absconding TCS employee’s lawyer told court
content: A TCS employee accused of religious harassment in Nashik has sought anticipatory bail, citing pregnancy and other grounds. The IT giant stated its internal review found no prior complaints on its official channels. The case has led to multiple arrests and a high-level probe ordered by the Maharashtra Chief Minister.

title: KL Rahul reveals 'Virat Kohli, Phil Salt weren't happy'
content: Delhi Capitals, led by KL Rahul, secured a thrilling six-wicket victory over Royal Challengers Bengaluru. Despite an early collapse, Rahul anchored the chase with a fifty, supported by Tristan Stubbs and David Miller's explosive finish. The win halted RCB's home winning streak, with bowlers finding assistance on a tricky M. Chinnaswamy pitch.

title: UP man buys truck, runs over son’s killer in revenge, stages fatal crash; plot unravels during probe
content: Driven by vengeance for his son's murder, a man amassed funds, bought a truck, and rammed it into the accused's SUV, staging the death as an accident. Technical evidence and an audio clip later revealed the premeditated murder, leading to a manhunt for the absconding perpetrator.

title: Kamala says Trump was ‘pulled into’ Iran war by Bibi, calls it a distraction
content: Kamala Harris launched a strong critique of Donald Trump, alleging he was drawn into the Iran conflict by Benjamin Netanyahu to divert from domestic issues like the 'Epstein files'. She labelled the current US leadership as "most corrupt, callous and incompetent" and accused Trump of undermining alliances and international norms, making America unreliable.

title: India's next T20I captain? Shreyas Iyer breathing down Surya's neck
content: Shreyas Iyer, a seasoned IPL captain, is making a strong case for a return to the Indian T20I squad.  Reunited with coach Ricky Ponting at Punjab Kings, Iyer's consistent form and leadership potential are drawing attention.  He's seen as a strong contender to replace Suryakumar Yadav, with selectors weighing his immediate impact and future captaincy prospects.

title: ‘Relations very strong’: Iran after India summons envoy over firing on its vessels in Hormuz
content: Iran's top representative in India, Dr. Abdul Majid Hakeem Ilahi, addressed a shooting incident involving India-flagged vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, emphasizing strong bilateral ties. He stated he had no information about the event but expressed hope for its peaceful resolution, advocating for peace in the region.

title: Should you buy gold this Akshaya Tritiya? What 5 experts have to say
content: Today is Akshaya Tritiya, an auspicious day in the Hindu calendars, believed to bring lasting prosperity and good fortune. Buying gold on this day is considered auspicious. Experts believe that returns on gold over the last few years reinforce its role as a long-term wealth preserver.

title: India, Russia can now station 3k troops in each other’s territory
content: India and Russia have activated a logistics pact allowing each to station up to 3,000 troops, five warships and ten aircraft in the other’s territory for five years, extendable by mutual consent. The agreement enhances military cooperation, supports equipment servicing, enables joint exercises and missions, and grants reciprocal access to bases, strengthening interoperability in the Indo-Pacific and Arctic regions.

title: How a Michelin-star chef reimagined leftovers for the world
content: Chef Massimo Bottura's nonprofit, Food for Soul, transforms surplus food into nourishing meals, combating waste and poverty.  Inspired by his grandmother's resourcefulness, the organization creates welcoming spaces that offer dignity and hope, proving that discarded ingredients can become a source of sustenance and community.

title: United flight diverted, passengers evacuated via emergency slides in Pittsburgh - watch
content: A United Airlines flight from Chicago to New York made an emergency landing in Pittsburgh due to a 'beeping noise' onboard, initially feared to be a bomb threat. Passengers were evacuated via emergency slides. Following a thorough sweep by the FBI and bomb squad, no explosives were found, and the aircraft was cleared. Passengers were later rebooked on new flights.

title: 'Red flag': US intel flags Pakistan army chief Asim Munir as risk for Trump admin, says report
content: US intelligence reportedly views Pakistan's army chief Asim Munir as a potential liability for the Trump administration due to his alleged ties to Iran's military. Despite Trump's praise, officials warn Munir's mediation role between Iran and the US amid Middle East tensions could compromise American interests, citing Pakistan's history as an unreliable ally.

title: Amravati sex abuse: 15-year-old 1st survivor to record statement
content: A 15-year-old survivor bravely came forward to record her statement in the Amravati sexual abuse case. This is a significant breakthrough for the special investigation team. Police are actively searching for seven other identified survivors. The main accused and others are already named in the FIR. Authorities are urging anyone with information to come forward to ensure justice.

title: Caught on camera: Kavya Maran's wild celebration after SRH down CSK - Watch
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad secured a thrilling 10-run victory over Chennai Super Kings, propelling them into the top four of the IPL 2026 standings. Strong death bowling and crucial half-centuries from Abhishek Sharma and Heinrich Klaasen were key to the win. Despite a strong chase from CSK, SRH's bowlers held their nerve to clinch the crucial points.

title: 'Weight dropped to 22kg': 75-year-old kept in shackles by relatives, forced to live outside her home
content: A 75-year-old woman, Prerna Devi, allegedly held in shackles by relatives in Amritsar, has been rescued and moved to an old-age home.  The Punjab State Commission for Women intervened after a video of her plight went viral. Police have registered a case against her son and daughter-in-law for alleged maltreatment and neglect.

title: West Bengal elections: Nearly 7 lakh voters added to electoral rolls days before polls
content: West Bengal's electoral rolls have seen an addition of nearly seven lakh voters ahead of assembly elections. While the Election Commission has not yet released detailed demographic data, including first-time voters or gender-wise breaks, the total electorate now stands at over 6.82 crore. This comes after a Special Intensive Revision report indicated significant net deletions of voters in the state.

title: Explained: On way to 4th largest economy, how India slipped to 6th rank
content: In fact, IMF’s latest World Economic Outlook (April 2026) sees India sitting at the sixth spot this financial year too. What has led to the sudden fall? Why has India dropped to the sixth position, falling behind the UK, instead of overtaking Japan to become the fourth largest economy?

title: 'Vaishali didn't even see chess for 15 days': A miraculous story behind Candidates glory
content: Vaishali Rameshbabu’s journey to the Women’s Candidates title wasn’t easy. After a poor run in Chennai shattered her confidence, she even considered skipping the Grand Swiss. A crucial two-hour call with Karthikeyan Murali changed her mind. A mental reset helped her win the event, regain form, and now she prepares to face world champion Ju Wenjun.

title: Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin eyes breakthrough with reusable New Glenn launch amid SpaceX rivalry
content: Jeff Bezos's Blue Origin is set to achieve a major milestone by reusing a New Glenn rocket booster for the first time on Sunday. This heavy-lift rocket, carrying an AST SpaceMobile satellite, aims to cut costs and boost competition with SpaceX.  A successful reuse could significantly advance Blue Origin's lunar ambitions and its role in NASA's Artemis program.

title: Sources: Giants flip Lawrence for Bengals' pick
content: The Giants are trading DT Dexter Lawrence to the Bengals in a deal for the No. 10 pick in next week's NFL draft, sources told ESPN.

title: LeBron plays 'triple threat' to spring Game 1 upset
content: With Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves sidelined, LeBron James ignited the Lakers' offense with "a little bit of everything," posting 19 points, 13 assists, eight rebounds and two steals in a Game 1 upset of the Rockets.

title: Buoyed by Brunson, Knicks seal 'hard-fought win'
content: Jalen Brunson scored 22 of his game-high 28 points in the first half Saturday at Madison Square Garden, and New York posted a 113-102 victory over the Atlanta Hawks in Game 1 of their Eastern Conference first-round series.

title: Murray's FT dominance irks Wolves, lifts Nuggets
content: Jamal Murray had a tremendous night at the free throw line, making all 16 of his attempts to carry the Nuggets past the Wolves in Game 1, during which Nikola Jokic and Aaron Gordon had a quiet first half.

title: Mullins, projected 1st-round pick, to stay at UConn
content: UConn's Braylon Mullins, who is ranked No. 17 on ESPN's most recent NBA draft big board, will look to boost his stock with a second season in Storrs.

title: Oettinger, Stars falter, face familiar 1-0 deficit
content: Continuing an undesirable pattern for fans at American Airlines Center, Dallas lost Game 1 for the ninth time in the past 11 playoff series on Saturday, as Jake Oettinger and the Stars lost to the Minnesota Wild 6-1 in a contest they quickly trailed 4-0.

title: Mets in free fall after losing 10th straight game
content: The Mets lost their 10th straight game Saturday, the team's longest skid since 2004. Only three teams have made the postseason after a losing streak that long.

title: Skydiver crashes into Hokies' scoreboard, rescued
content: A skydiver was rescued and in stable condition after crashing into the Lane Stadium scoreboard before Virginia Tech's spring football game Saturday.

title: 🏈 Kiper's two-round NFL mock draft
content: Mel Kiper Jr. predicts 64 picks across the first two rounds of the NFL draft, including two potential trades, a few QB landing spots and plenty of impact additions.

title: The fallout of a stunning Dexter Lawrence trade: Four takeaways on the NFL draft, the Bengals, more
content: The Giants traded Lawrence to the Bengals for the No. 10 pick in the draft. What does that say about the NFL's trade market, this draft class and the state of the Bengals?

title: How did the Bengals, Giants do in the Dexter Lawrence II trade?
content: We're handing out report cards on big moves, including the Giants trading Dexter Lawrence II to the Bengals.

title: Postseason preview: Matchups, biggest questions and what to know
content: Everything you need to know for the Thunder, Pistons, Spurs, Celtics and 16 other teams chasing the 2026 NBA title.

title: Offseason guides: Draft, free agency, trade targets for eliminated teams
content: Summer is here for franchises that missed the playoffs. What lies ahead for the Hornets, Clippers and more?

title: Inside the fallout of the Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel photos
content: How Dianna Russini and New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel scrambled to respond to photos published in the New York Post.

title: One year later: Who won the Jaguars-Browns draft-day trade for Travis Hunter?
content: The Browns and Jags swapped picks in 2025 so Jacksonville could draft Hunter. Now, Cleveland has an extra first-rounder in 2026.

title: Man United close in on UCL return by beating increasingly toxic Chelsea
content: Michael Carrick seems to have the blueprint to get Man United back to Europe's top competition after beating Chelsea, whose season is quickly slipping away.

title: The biggest question facing every WNBA team in training camp
content: How will Angel Reese fit the Dream? Will the Wings return to the playoffs? Can Caitlin Clark remain healthy?

title: Spurs find silver lining vs. Brighton, but not a desperately needed win
content: Tottenham still haven't won in the Premier League in 2026, following Saturday's 2-2 draw with Brighton. Nevertheless, there are positives to take.

title: Man City vs. Arsenal: What to watch for in Premier League title showdown
content: Arsenal's visit to Man City on Sunday will likely decide who wins the league. Here are the keys to the match.

title: Playoff concessions go big: NBA, NHL teams unveil new foods
content: It's playoff time in the NBA and NHL, and some teams are breaking out some wild concessions for fans to enjoy in the postseason.

title: Biggest haters funeral: Chris Paul pokes fun at Clippers after play-in tournament loss
content: The LA Clippers saw their season end Wednesday, and an ex-Clipper made sure to rub salt in the wound.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, strategies and more
content: Everything you need to know before your fantasy women's basketball draft, including rankings, tips and news.

title: 10 NFL draft prospects to put on your fantasy radar -- and three others to monitor
content: With the NFL draft nearly upon us, it's time to think about how the top prospects will fare in fantasy.

title: Mason Miller tops all pitchers? CJ Abrams goes 30-100-30? Don't be surprised
content: Eric Karabell looks into the crystal ball to tell fantasy baseball managers what might come to pass in the not-too-distant future.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool eye Wharton amid Man United, Real Madrid interest
content: Liverpool face competition from Manchester United and Real Madrid to sign Crystal Palace midfielder Adam Wharton. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Student deaths in NIT Kurukshetra: CPI(M) MP Brittas seeks Education Minister's intervention
content: In his letter, John Brittas noted that four students have died at the institute between February and April this year

title: Congress, DMK opposition to ‘Women’s Reservation Bill’ won’t be tolerated: Amit Shah
content: Women have been denied crucial opportunities due to the actions of the Congress and the DMK, and such practices will not be tolerated, Amit Shah said

title: SC issues pan-India directions for road safety, says expressways should not become corridor of peril
content: A Bench of Justices J.K. Maheshwari and A.S. Chandurkar pointed out that national highways constitute 2% of India’s total road length but account for nearly 30% of all road fatalities

title: ED conducts raids at residences of senior cop, businessman in Kolkata over ‘money laundering’
content: The Enforcement Directorate is searching locations linked to Kolkata Police Deputy Commissioner Shantanu Sinha Biswas and businessman Joy Kamdar in the Sona Pappu case under the PMLA

title: Actor Parthiban moves Madras High Court seeking ‘no caste, no religion’ certificate
content: The actor says the Tamil Nadu government is “sleeping over the matter” despite an order passed by a Division Bench of the High Court on June 10, 2025

title: Air quality poor in Delhi
content: The weather department has predicted a partly cloudy sky with the maximum temperature expected to touch 40 degrees Celsius

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Densely populated Maduravoyal constituency sees signs of progress while some civic issues linger
content: Garbage disposal remains a concern as unsegregated waste is left exposed for days, attracting stray animals; encroachments along the banks of Cooum river have narrowed parts of the waterway; apart from such issues, residents say that there have been visible improvements in recent years

title: West Bengal Pradesh Congress says no post-poll alliance
content: Bengal Congress Committee chief tries to dispel reports on the possibility of post-poll tie-up with TMC; the Congress is contesting all Assembly seats on its own strength in the State, ending a decade-long understanding with the CPI(M)-led Left Front

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Disappointed over confusion post bifurcation, Tirukkoyilur constituency electors feel neglected
content: Tirukkoyilur Assembly Constituency is witnessing a generational shift with sitting MLA and DMK strongman K. Ponmudi having been been denied seat and replaced by his son and former MP Gowtham Sigamani. For now, the DMK treads a tricky path of battling anti-incumbency while the AIADMK hopes to cash in on it

title: Punjab governor gives assent to anti-sacrilege Bill
content: The Jaagat Jot Sri Guru Granth Sahib Satkar (Amendment) Bill, 2026, proposes stricter punishments to deter incidents of 'beadbi' (sacrilege) and uphold the sanctity of the Guru Granth Sahib.

title: Telangana Heatwave: Ten districts exceed 44°C; Kerameri hits 44.6°C
content: The data from the Telangana Development Planning Society showed that 10 districts recorded temperatures exceeding 44°C, while 13 districts experienced temperatures between 43°C and 44°C

title: Soldier found dead in Jammu camp, investigation under way
content: The exact cause of death will be ascertained after the completion of the investigation, the officials said

title: Darjeeling hills to witness multi-pronged contest on diverse issues in 2026 Assembly polls
content: While the BJP-GJM alliance and the Trinamool-BGPM alliance are clashing head-on, a new hill party by local entrepreneur Ajay Edwards is also making its presence; along with the pertinent issue of Gorkhaland political situation, the issues of development and corruption may sway the electorate this election season

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Gobichettipalayam in focus after Sengottaiyan’s exit from AIADMK
content: Predominantly agrarian, Gobichettipalayam is known for its picturesque fields and brimming canals. — landscapes that have featured in numerous Tamil films, earning it the sobriquet “Chinna Kodambakkam.”

title: Opposition likely to write to PM to immediately implement women’s reservation without delimitation
content: Telangana Chief Minister Revanth Reddy says BJP using women’s reservation as a cover to change the Constitution and end reservation for Dalits and tribals

title: Four feared dead in major chain accident on NH-50 in Karnataka’s Vijayanagara district
content: Preliminary reports indicate that a garlic-laden lorry from Haryana, allegedly driven in a rash and negligent manner, first struck two motorcycles about three kilometres before the main accident site

title: Kerala urges caution over contaminated ice as temperatures soar, steps up food safety checks
content: Kerala Health Minister says that in view of rising temperatures, Food Safety department has intensified special inspections focusing on drinking water sources, juice shops, and beverage manufacturing units

title: Despite setback, Govt. determined to remove all obstacles to women’s reservation: PM Modi
content: In his 30-minute speech, the prime minister criticised Opposition parties, including the Congress, DMK, Trinamool Congress and Samajwadi Party

title: Prakash Raj should tender unconditional apology to all Hindus: Valmiki Research Center Director Lajapathirai
content: In a press release, Dr. Lajapathirai said that Mr. Prakash Raj should read Valmiki Ramayana completely and understand its epic’s contribution to the society

title: In a first, migratory honey bees get ‘warm womb’ to stay back in winters in Kashmir
content: The Council of Scientific and Industrial Research-Indian Institute of Integrative Medicine (CSIR-IIIM), Pulwama, has been working on climate resilient honeybees to allow beekeepers to avoid having to transfer them to the plains to survive the winter

title: PM's address violated Model Code of Conduct: CPI MP alleges in letter to CEC
content: In his address on April 18, the Prime Minister warned the Congress and its allies of severe punishment from the women for the "sin of foeticide"

title: VMC will bring water from Andra reservoir to meet water needs of Fort City
content: The Fort City needs around 47 million litres per day. However, the availability is said to be below 35 MLD during April and May months

title: Trinamool ‘betrayed’ women, will be punished in West Bengal elections, says Modi
content: “We have seen how the TMC betrayed women in Parliament. The TMC conspired with the Congress to prevent the passage of the Bill as it is against women’s empowerment,” Mr. Modi said

title: Congress leader in Kerala moves ECI against PM Modi
content: Congress leader Anil Akkara files complaint against PM Modi for alleged election code violation via national broadcaster Doordarshan

title: Cultural programme marks Bengali New Year in Visakhapatnam
content: The event was organised by Sudipta Banerjee, who is associated with the temple, with support from members of “Amra Kojon”, who presented music and dance performances

title: Two Indian men shot dead in Italy while leaving gurdwara
content: The attack occurred on April 17, a few minutes before midnight in the square in front of the Gurdwara Mata Sahib Kaur Ji in the industrial area of the town

title: G20 satellite expected to be launched in 2027: ISRO chief Narayanan
content: Addressing scientists from DRDO, ISRO, and the Aeronautical Society of India at the Engineering Staff College of India, Dr. Narayanan also said India is the first country to succeed in placing 104 satellites, more than 100 satellites using a single rocket without any collision.

title: India LPG consumption slides 13% amid West Asia conflict
content: LPG consumption was at 2.379 million tonne in March, 12.8% lower than 2.729 million tonne consumed in the same period last year

title: PM Modi to address the nation tonight at 8:30 p.m.
content: The Prime Minister is expected to delve into the issue of the implementation of the women’s quota and the happenings in Parliament

title: Chamarajanagar Deputy Commissioner says no blazers, ties, or heavy uniforms for students amid heatwave
content: As the Chamarajanagar district recorded a maximum temperature of 38.8 degrees, all educational institutions were instructed to make adequate provisions for clean drinking water in all rooms

title: Kerala elections: Kozhikode DCC general secretary Nijesh Aravind quits, cites ‘sidelining’ in party
content: Nijesh Aravind submits resignation to KPCC claiming he was ‘deliberately excluded’ from poll campaign responsibilities

title: Elderly woman killed in suspected leopard attack at Malakkappara
content: Body found partially eaten near Sholayar dam area as residents raise alarm over rising wildlife threats

title: News in Frames: Waltz of the winds
content: A ‘disturbance’ in the weather system brings rain to India during non-monsoon months but can also disrupt agricultural schedules and trigger extreme events

title: Kalapriya: from a DMK campaigner and fan of MGR to renowned littérateur
content: Kalapriya says that before joining the DMK, MGR was associated with the Congress. Over the time, he surrounded himself with seasoned political minds, including communist leaders K.  Baladhandayutham  and  Kalyanasundaram. He was further supported by experienced figures such as K.A. Krishnaswamy  and Panruti S. Ramachandran. This combination of cinematic influence and political acumen gave him an exceptional grasp of governance as well as mass psychology.

title: Revanth-KCR parallel rallies on the same day set the stage for political showdown
content: There is considerable public curiosity around his speech, especially on whether he will directly target the Congress government led by Mr. Revanth Reddy or continue his strategy of avoiding personal references to the Chief Minister

title: Jayakanthan’s ‘Cinemavukku Pona Chitthalu’: on the influence of film personalities on the masses
content: Jayakanthan’s novella, ‘Cinemavukku Pona Chitthalu,’ explores the impact of film culture on identity and social dynamics through the story of Kamsalai, a devoted admirer of Tamil cinema icon M.G. Ramachandran (MGR). Set in Chennai, the narrative captures a time when MGR’s influence shaped Tamil Nadu’s political landscape.

title: After TVK’s nomination rejection in Edappadi, Vijay backs independent candidate
content: TVK chief urged people to vote for Mr. Premkumar under the ‘Television’ symbol; Mr. Vijay announced his support for an independent candidate after his party’s candidate’s nomination was rejected.

title: T.N. election 2026: West Asia conflict eclipses election debates among Muslims in Ramanathapuram
content: Iran draws near-universal sympathy in Ramanathapuram, though the Muslim population is largely not Shia

title: Tamil Nadu election: Biryani caterers work around fuel shortages, inflation for political meetings
content: The bond between politics and biryani has been strained by the war in West Asia that has inflated the price of LPG gas cylinders and as a collateral, that of firewood too, hitting mass caterers across the State.

title: Uttar Pradesh implements advanced unified command system under Jal Jeevan Mission
content: The system, managed through the Unified Command and Control System (UCCS), will enable real-time monitoring and control of water supply systems, covering parameters related to water quality, distribution efficiency, and asset performance across rural areas.

title: PM Modi ‘denying funds to T.N.’ but making frequent poll visits to State: Udhayanidhi
content: “Funds were not forthcoming, but our rights were curtailed,” the Deputy Chief Minister said, adding that attempts were being made to impose Hindi in the State

title: H-CITI project in the legal crosshairs on the KBR National Park buffer zone
content: The petitioners have waged a pitched battle with the State and central governments, challenging the notification issued by the Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate Change, fixing the Eco Sensitive Zone for the park without following the due process.

title: T.N. Assembly election: AIADMK is just a mask for BJP, says Rahul Gandhi at Ponneri

title: Buoyed by win in Parliament, opposition plans impeachment motion against CEC again

title: Man United beat Chelsea, Spurs let lead slip
content: Another Saturday, another day full of  Premier League  drama, with results that may well decide the futures of several clubs as little more than a month remains of the 2025-26 season. In our first game,  Tottenham Hotspur  let a chance to climb out of the relegation zone slip as Roberto De Zerbi's side surrendered a 2-1 lead in second-half stoppage time against  Brighton & Hove Albion , settling for a 2-2 draw and remaining in 18th place. In the day's late contest,  Manchester United  went some way to cementing their place in next season's  UEFA Champions League  by defeating  Chelsea  1-0 at Stamford Bridge, moving 10 points clear of the sixth-placed Blues. Relive all the action from Saturday's matches with ESPN.
